status: MVP core functional: M60 SNMPv1 connect/poll verified with known-good live OIDs and structured dashboard telemetry

architecture.core_pattern: Abstract Device base class with registry + factory

features: Known-good OID polling for sysDescr, current pattern, unit status, phase status, and detector status
Structured status fields rendered in timing panel (pattern/unit/phase/detector summaries)
Safe command probe mode (GET-only) to validate command OID targets without SNMP SET writes
Timing command buttons wired to command() method
limitations: Pattern control command OID 1.3.6.1.4.1.1206.4.2.1.8.0 probes as noSuchName on target controller
Command OIDs still require final Siemens field validation before production use
No persistent command audit logging yet

next_priorities: Validate Siemens command SET OIDs/values from field docs or controlled probe

division_of_labor.Grok: Planning, architecture, standards/vendor research, scoped tickets

notes_for_copilot: All control commands need safety logging
notes_for_grok: SNMPv1 works, v2c times out on target M60
Working poll OIDs now integrated from live walk; focus next on safe command OID validation
